items.title: 攻殻機動隊 THE GHOST IN THE SHELL

summaries.zh: 《攻殻機動隊 THE GHOST IN THE SHELL》是一部关注度高的话题作品，引发2839人关注。
summaries.en: "Ghost in the Shell" is a cyberpunk-themed work focusing on a futuristic world where humans can undergo cyberization, integrating mechanical bodies with digital networks. The narrative explores themes of identity, consciousness, and the nature of humanity in a technologically advanced society. The story follows characters as they navigate complex scenarios involving artificial intelligence, cybernetic enhancements, and virtual realities. The title "Ghost in the Shell" refers to the philosophical question of what defines a human spirit or soul in a world where physical and digital boundaries blur. The work is known for its philosophical depth and visual style.

items.summary: 《攻殻機動隊 THE GHOST IN THE SHELL》是一部关注度高的话题作品，引发2839人关注。
